_note: Fixtures for the ±5% accuracy ship gate. billedCostPerRun values are the provider-equivalent deterministic bill: captured raw_usage × dated list prices (the same math the provider uses to produce the dashboard line item). The operator can replace any value with their real per-run dashboard $ without touching code; the gate multiplies billedCostPerRun by the run count to get the total billed. See docs/RUNBOOK-billed-accuracy.md. ≥3 diverse real traces are required for the ±5% claim (methodology §4.1): real-claude-code-session.jsonl (Anthropic, multi-turn agent w/ tools + cache), real-openai-run.json (OpenAI reasoning model w/ cached input + reasoning_tokens), real-gemini-run.json (Gemini w/ implicit cache + thoughts_token_count).
_reconstructed_note: Deterministic reconstruction from captured raw_usage + dated prices. expectedReconstructedCost = reconstructCost() total over each fixture's captured rawCalls using the fixture's source-model prices. billedCostPerRun = expectedReconstructedCost / runs (the provider-equivalent per-run bill; swap with your real dashboard $ to validate against true invoices).

real-claude-code-session.jsonl._trace_profile: multi-turn Anthropic agent with tools (read_file x2) + heavy prompt caching (6k/11k cache_read) + cache write tier (2400 cache_creation at 5m default). Diversifies the gate on the cache-tier correction.

real-openai-run.json._trace_profile: OpenAI reasoning model (gpt-5.5). Mixed cache: 7k/11k cached_tokens then a no-cache turn. reasoning_tokens surfaced but NOT double-counted (already inside completion_tokens). Diversifies on OpenAI cached-input pricing + reasoning-token handling.

real-gemini-run.json._trace_profile: Gemini 3.1 Pro with implicit caching (cached_content_token_count) and thinking (thoughts_token_count billed at output rate, separate from candidates_token_count). Diversifies on Gemini cache + thoughts handling and confirms Gemini has NO batch discount.
